hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); case "$input" in *M_DECISION*) echo '\''{"decision":"block","reason":"BLK-decision"}'\'' ;; *M_PERMISSION*) echo '\''{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLK-permission"}}'\'' ;; *M_EXIT2*) exit 2 ;; esac'
